topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Performance Testing. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for QA Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Performance Testing is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Performance Testing in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Performance Testing
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Performance Testing.

interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Performance Testing?
How does Performance Testing handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Performance Testing into a microservice
Scale Performance Testing for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Performance Testing
